description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Release that runs on pull requests to the release branch. Use a single windows-latest job that checks out the code, sets up Python 3.12, installs requirements, runs PyInstaller, builds game config and cache, copies and packs game files, and uploads a Windows artifact. Also, read the version from package.json, checks if a 'Test' tag exists, and creates a release with the artifact if the tag does not exist.
